items.summary: Debug and fix the search functionality to ensure that when users click the search button or press Enter after typing a Persian product query (e.g., 'گوشی', 'لپ‌تاپ'), the system displays product results instead of showing the 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message. Verify the complete flow from SearchInput component through useProductSearch hook to the backend searchByProductTitle function.

Analyze and test the complete search flow in both frontend and backend to identify why search results are not displaying. Check: 1) SearchInput component properly calls the search handler, 2) useProductSearch hook correctly invokes the actor method, 3) backend searchByProductTitle function processes the query and returns results, 4) ProductResults component receives and renders the returned data.

Enhance the StoreManagement component to create a comprehensive form that collects all information required by the search engine from users who want to add their stores. The form must include fields for: store name (Persian), store URL/link, city selection (from existing Iranian cities dropdown), reputation score (1-5 stars), and any additional metadata needed for search ranking and product discovery.

Update the backend to support persistent storage of user-submitted stores with all required fields: store name, URL, city, reputation score, and any additional metadata. Ensure the addCustomStore function (or equivalent) saves this data to stable storage and makes it available for future search queries.

Connect the enhanced StoreManagement form to the backend by implementing the submission handler that calls the backend addCustomStore function with all collected form data. Display success toast notification in Persian when store is added successfully, and error toast if submission fails. Clear the form fields after successful submission.
